# Qubox ${{ github.ref_name }}

<!-- release notes generated by softprops/action-gh-release -->

## Installation

See [apps/daemon/README.md](apps/daemon/README.md) for per-platform install instructions.

### Linux
```bash
# DEB (Debian/Ubuntu)
sudo dpkg -i quboxd_*.deb

# RPM (Fedora/RHEL)
sudo rpm -i qubaixd-*.rpm

# AppImage (any distro)
chmod +x Qubox-*-x86_64.AppImage
./Qubox-*-x86_64.AppImage
```

### Windows
Run `QuboxDaemon-*-x64.msi` as Administrator.

### macOS
```bash
sudo installer -pkg QuboxDaemon-*-universal.pkg -target /
```
